title: alchemilla asterophylla subsp. fontqueri
intro: Alchemilla asterophylla subsp. fontqueri, a subspecies of the alpine lady's mantle plant, is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla asterophylla subsp. fontqueri include reducing inflammation and pain, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
